input.prompt: Create a summary of the project architecture and save it as a text file in my Downloads/shinobu directory.
Create a summary of the project architecture and save it as a text file in my Downloads/shinobu directory.

subtasks.title: Read project architecture details
subtasks.description: Retrieve the current project architecture information from available sources such as configuration files, documentation, or system state.

subtasks.title: Analyze and summarize project architecture
subtasks.description: Process the retrieved information to extract key components, structure, relationships, and design principles into a coherent summary.

subtasks.title: Create summary.txt file in ~/Downloads/shinobu/
subtasks.description: Generate a text file named 'summary.txt' within the specified directory path and write the generated summary into it.
